Precise Eye Tests Done

What we offer

A complete vision atelier, under one roof.

From your first comprehensive eye exam to the moment you walk out wearing your new lenses, every detail is engineered for clarity, comfort and quiet elegance.

Digital Eye Testing

State-of-the-art computerized refraction and retinal screening for accuracy you can trust.

Explore

Progressive Lenses

Seamless near, intermediate and far vision in a single lens — by Essilor, Hoya & Zeiss.

Explore

Contact Lenses

Premium daily, monthly and toric lenses fitted by certified specialists.

Explore

Kids Vision Care

Gentle paediatric assessments and durable frames designed for tiny faces.

Explore

Computer Glasses

Blue-cut and anti-fatigue lenses crafted for IT professionals and students.

Explore

Designer Sunglasses

UV-protective sunglasses from the world's most coveted fashion houses.

Explore

Prescription Frames

A curated catalog of luxury and contemporary frames in every silhouette.

Explore

Fashion Eyewear

Style-led consultations pairing your face structure with the right silhouette.

Explore

Houses we represent

The world's finest eyewear, curated for Pune.

Now at Eylux · The Future of Eyewear

Meet the Meta AI
smart glasses.

Designed in collaboration with Ray-Ban and Oakley, the new generation of Meta AI eyewear lets you capture, listen, call and ask — without ever reaching for your phone. Try them on at our boutique.

Built-in 12MP Camera
Hands-free Voice AI
Open-ear Audio
Crystal-clear Calls
Explore Meta GlassesBook a Demo
AI Powered

Available

Ray-Ban & Oakley Meta

Why Eylux

Six reasons families across Pune trust their vision to us.

Advanced diagnostic equipment

Computerized refraction, slit-lamp examination and retinal imaging — accurate to a fraction of a dioptre.

Certified opticians

Our optometrists are trained by Essilor, Zeiss and Hoya for the most demanding prescriptions.

Authentic premium brands

Every frame and lens is sourced from authorized distributors — never counterfeits, never compromises.

Personalised consultation

Unhurried 45-minute appointments. We listen to your lifestyle before we ever measure your eyes.

Fashion + vision expertise

Style-led frame selection that balances facial geometry, complexion and personal aesthetic.

Family-friendly boutique

A space where children, parents and seniors all feel cared for — three generations of trust.

The boutique

A space where precision meets poise.

Walk into a quietly luxurious studio in Keshav Nagar — warm lighting, velvet displays and unhurried consultations. The way eyewear shopping should always have felt.

The boutique

Velvet, marble, gold.

Eye testing suite

Clinical-grade diagnostics.

Trusted by Pune

Stories from people who see better with us.

Common questions

Everything you might like to know.

A typical Eylux consultation lasts 30–45 minutes. We include computerized refraction, retinal screening, ocular health checks and a styling consultation if you are also choosing frames.

Begin the journey

Book your eye test
today.

Walk into our Hadapsar boutique for a complimentary consultation. We'll measure, advise and craft the perfect pair — together.
